description_long: This object consists of a group of eighteen triangular traffic warning signs, each mounted on a slender, vertical metal post. The signs feature a white background with a bold red border and various black pictograms, each representing different road hazards or warnings such as pedestrian crossings, road narrowing, curves, bumps, and falling rocks. One sign includes the text 'GO SLOW' in uppercase letters. The signs are arranged in neat rows, with each sign facing outward, making the symbols and text clearly visible from the front. The posts appear to be made of metal, likely steel, and the sign faces are likely made of reflective metal or plastic for visibility. This collection is typical of what might be found in a municipal storage yard, training facility, or as a display for educational or planning purposes.
description: A group of eighteen triangular warning traffic signs on metal posts, each displaying different road hazard symbols and one with the text 'GO SLOW'. The signs have red borders, white backgrounds, and are arranged in neat rows.
description_view_0: Front view showing all sign faces, with clear visibility of the various warning symbols and the 'GO SLOW' text.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the signs and the alignment of the posts in two rows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unmarked backs of the triangular signs and the tops of the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the signs and the arrangement of the posts.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Various black pictograms including pedestrian, children crossing, road narrowing, curves, bumps, falling rocks, traffic lights, and deer.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersections, school zones, and areas with specific road hazards
